pi_items.source: task.json specification; agent must create a saved search with this exact case-sensitive name in Nuxeo Web UI
PDF text extraction verified that Annual Report 2023 and Q3 Status Report both contain the word 'report' in their content; Project Proposal does not
setup_nuxeo.sh uploads annual_report_2023.pdf with dc:title='Annual Report 2023' to Projects workspace; PDF file (9.6 KB) contains word 'report'
setup_nuxeo.sh creates Note document with dc:title='Q3 Status Report' in Projects workspace (lines 236-240); document contains 'report' in its content
project_proposal.pdf (9.3 KB) is uploaded with dc:title='Project Proposal'; text extraction shows it does NOT contain 'report' keyword, making it correctly excluded from Report search

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and consistent with actual data. The task uses synthetic data (PDFs generated with ReportLab and created 2026-02-22) containing ACME Corporation business documents. The search functionality correctly differentiates between documents: 'Annual Report 2023' and 'Q3 Status Report' both contain the keyword 'Report' and should be included in saved search results, while 'Project Proposal' does not contain this keyword and should be excluded. The saved search must be named exactly 'Project Reports Search' (case-sensitive).
